title: Conditions for 3I
wikitext:
[]: Conditions for 3I             Quote Post by Caiden » Mon Aug 18, 2008 8:46 pm Well Hello, The biggest thing that i don't understand is what exactly triggers 3I. It was always told that If an angel comes in contact with lilith the 3rd impact will happen. But than what was SEELE trying to accomplish With the Mass Production Models? What would of happend if Rei/Gendo failed to get to Lilth I just don't understand how Eva 01 and the Mass Produced Evas Can produce 3I Other things: What was SEELE Trying to Accomplish by sending Kaworu. If Kaworu would have succeded, if like SEELE wanted, what was the point of even fighting the angels If SEELE dident want kaworu to succeced why dident they just kill him anyway. Anddddd LoL was a safeguard toward 3I. Then why dident it work ,one, and two, in what way was it a safeguard

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 18, 2008 8:52 pm Ack though Asuka is awesome, no image sigs allowed! @_@ Anyway, with what triggers Third Impact: Lilith and Adam uniting. Seele sent Kaworu because they wanted him to die so all the Angels could be defeated. Any other questions I didn't mention are probably addressed here: http://www.evageeks.org/FGP/

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Mon Aug 18, 2008 8:59 pm Well Hello, The biggest thing that i don't understand is what exactly triggers 3I. It was always told that If an angel comes in contact with lilith the 3rd impact will happen. But than what was SEELE trying to accomplish With the Mass Production Models? What would of happend if Rei/Gendo failed to get to Lilth I just don't understand how Eva 01 and the Mass Produced Evas Can produce 3I

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Aug 18, 2008 9:05 pm Everything You Always Wanted to Know About Third Impact (But Were(n't) Afraid to Ask) Basically 2 parts are needed for Instrumentality: 1. An Adam-derived S2 engine and being(s) with the ability to exert an Anti AT Field strong enough to wipe out all the AT Fields on Earth. That's why Seele needed the 9 S2 equipped MPEs in End of Eva. 2. Lilith or Unit-01, because they were the only link to the Black Moon/Egg of Lilith which is the origin of all Lilim Souls. So basically, the S2s wipe out the AT Field, and then Lilith/01 collects all souls together inside Lilith's Egg, and voila! We're in instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by Caiden » Mon Aug 18, 2008 9:18 pm ^^^ Hmm Nifty. Ty

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Aug 18, 2008 9:19 pm Oh, and welcome to you, Caiden!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Aug 18, 2008 10:26 pm Important to note: not all impacts are the same. Keel and Gendo likely intended completely different outcomes, the angels yet another one, and the one that went down may not have actually been what Seele wanted (though it started off that way). Other prior impacts may have literally been things hitting the earth, seeds deciding amongst themselves who gets to own this rock, or a seed blowing up / imploding to do... something... to the world and the angels.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 18, 2008 10:48 pm Well, there's two different types of Third Impact: Huge Ass Explosions like Second Impact, and Instrumentality, the fusing of all souls into one gestalt being. The biggest thing that i don't understand is what exactly triggers 3I. It was always told that If an angel comes in contact with lilith the 3rd impact will happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Aug 18, 2008 10:55 pm AuraTwilight wrote: It should be noted that Unit 01 is a perfect Lilith clone

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 18, 2008 11:11 pm Lolwut? Perfect? Why does it look like Adam?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Aug 18, 2008 11:19 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: It should be noted that Unit 01 is a perfect Lilith clone

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Aug 18, 2008 11:38 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Well, there's two different types of Third Impact: Huge Ass Explosions like Second Impact, and Instrumentality, the fusing of all souls into one gestalt being.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Aug 18, 2008 11:40 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Hey, the series is the one who coined the description, basically claiming that Unit 01 was a "new Lilith lol."

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Aug 18, 2008 11:45 pm Don't forget that Kaworu notes that the Evas are made of the same stuff as the Angels. Even though it seems both Lilith and ADO are made of PWM, the fact remains that 01 definitely has some Adam in her, and what part Lilith she is is still quite unclear.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Aug 18, 2008 11:49 pm Not made of the same stuff, born from Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Aug 18, 2008 11:55 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Action_Bastard wrote: Well, what did Lilith actually look like before she was put in central dogma and then merged with Rei???

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Aug 19, 2008 12:26 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Not made of the same stuff, born from Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Aug 19, 2008 3:39 pm or lilim get wiped out and angels take over. or maybe everything dies. or just a few people are instrumentalized and they rule over everyone else as a god. or adam and lilith hook up and just leave this stupid rock. or Shinji remakes the world into a sitcom. lots of possibilities.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Aug 19, 2008 4:08 pm Action_Bastard wrote: How do we know for sure?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Aug 19, 2008 5:58 pm I disagree. Clone doesn't fit what we are shown.
